title: quercus lanuginosa subsp. brachyphylla
intro: Quercus lanuginosa subsp. brachyphylla, also known as the Quercus brachyphylla, is a subspecies of the Quercus lanuginosa species, which is a type of evergreen tree native to China. This plant is a type of oak tree that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus brachyphylla include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
